feature_definition.amount: log((monthly wet-day precipitation sum mm + faithful-f32 base mean wet-day amount mm)/(wet-day count + 1))
feature_definition.calendar: generated output uses its emitted calendar; Daymet uses its pinned 365-day ordinal calendar
feature_definition.occurrence: monthly count of precipitation >= 0.254 mm divided by emitted days in month

fit_geometry.standardization: sample mean and sample SD within the 30 fit years
fit_geometry.variance_share: largest eigenvalue divided by the sum of nonnegative eigenvalues of the 48-feature correlation matrix

methods.h1_family_decomposition: for each horizon and family, sum max(candidate median - research-baseline median, 0) over stations, then divide by the sum over families

runtime_response.active_loading: absolute loading > 0 exactly in the committed JSON number
runtime_response.cell_aggregation: median realized/expected OLS slope ratio over eight 100-year candidate replicates
runtime_response.occurrence_expected_slope: OLS slope of logistic(intercept + loading*z) on the exact recorded annual states
runtime_response.station_aggregation: sign-match fraction and median cell response ratio over active monthly cells

seam_distance.distance: mean over 12 months of abs(generated annual-feature sample SD - evaluation Daymet sample SD)/max(evaluation Daymet sample SD, 1e-12)
seam_distance.replicate_aggregation: median distance over eight replicates separately by arm
seam_distance.seam_delta: candidate median distance - research-baseline median distance
seam_distance.unique_worst: largest seam delta is >= 0.10 and exceeds the second-largest seam delta by >= 0.05
